title: Launch Narrative Frames
description: A reference-led four-image series that establishes one cinematic hardware microsite language and then expands it into feature, spec, and conversion moments.
creative_direction: Treat the microsite like a premium launch film translated into web sections: one emotionally charged hero frame followed by quieter but still cinematic modules that preserve the same product identity, surface treatment, lighting logic, and information hierarchy.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04 so every downstream section preserves the same product language, environment cues, and material finish.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Launch Narrative Frames
en.description: A reference-led four-image series that establishes one cinematic hardware microsite language and then expands it into feature, spec, and conversion moments.

zh-CN.title: 发布叙事帧组
zh-CN.description: 以一张基准主视觉建立硬件微站语法，再延展到功能、规格与转化段落的四张系列图。
